task: Create src/middleware/fortress.js (CommonJS) that exports three things: (1) an Express middleware function that sets common security headers (e.g., X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: no-referrer, Content-Security-Policy as reasonably strict) and conditionally adds Strict-Transport-Security when process.env.FORTRESS_HSTS === 'true'; (2) an async Koa middleware (ctx, next) that mirrors the same header behavior; and (3) an Express Router named router that responds to GET /status/fo with JSON { status: 'ok', fortress: true }; ensure src/middleware directory exists (create it if missing). Update src/server.js to use CommonJS requires, require express, create the app (do not start or listen), require and apply the fortress Express middleware to the app, and mount the exported router so a request to /status/fo will be handled, then export the app (or otherwise avoid starting the server). Do not attempt to run npm test in this task (CI/npm is unavailable); only make the file additions/edits described.

subtasks.description: Create src/server.js using CommonJS requires; initialize Express app, apply fortress express middleware, mount its router for /status/fo, and export the app without starting/listening.
subtasks.test_command: python -c "import io,sys; p='src/server.js'; s=io.open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8').read(); assert 'require(\'express\')' in s and 'require(\'./middleware/fortress\')' in s and 'app = express()' in s and 'app.use(expressMiddleware)' in s and 'app.use(router)' in s and 'module.exports' in s; print('OK')"
subtasks.acceptance_criteria: src/server.js exists; uses CommonJS (require/module.exports); creates an Express app; applies fortress expressMiddleware; mounts the fortress router so GET /status/fo is handled; does not call app.listen or start the server; exports the app.

changes.explanation: Creates server.js using CommonJS, initializes Express app, applies fortress expressMiddleware, mounts fortress router at /status/fo, and exports the app without starting the server.

plan_summary: Add a new CommonJS Express app at src/server.js that requires and applies the existing fortress Express middleware and mounts its router, then exports the app without starting a server.
risk_assessment: Low — Single new file creation with straightforward Express wiring; potential minor risk is incorrect import path or accidentally starting the server, which acceptance criteria and test command mitigate.
